case_title: STATHIS MARAGOS VS. LORI MICHELE BROOKE et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-24-2003. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-05-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. JAN-24-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-04-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-04-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE APR-03-2003.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BROOKE, LORI MICHELE
STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED BY MARAGOS, STATHIS BROOKE, LORI MICHELE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARAGOS, STATHIS AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKE, LORI MICHELE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-24-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-21-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-09-2003
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BROOKE, LORI MICHELE ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR LAURENCE EDWARD DAVIS.
ARBITRATOR ERIC MARSHALL ABRAMSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-07-2003 THROUGH JUL-06-2003.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-05-2003 - CASE SETTLED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON JUL-15-2003 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 225.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION, ALL PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-15-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
